api.name: BlurFade
api.description: Motion primitive: blur + fade-in on mount or when in view.

parameters.name: ChildContent
parameters.description: The content that blurs and fades into view as it enters the viewport.

parameters.name: DelayMs
parameters.description: Milliseconds to wait after the element enters the viewport before starting the animation. Default 0.

parameters.name: DurationMs
parameters.description: Duration of the blur/fade/slide transition in milliseconds. Default 600.

parameters.name: BlurPx
parameters.description: Starting blur radius in pixels, animated down to 0 as the element reveals. Default 8.

parameters.name: Yoffset
parameters.description: Starting vertical offset in pixels, animated down to 0 as the element reveals. Default 8.

parameters.name: Once
parameters.description: When true (default), the reveal animation plays only the first time the element enters the viewport; when false, it replays on every entry.

parameters.name: ForceHidden
parameters.description: When true, always start in the hidden state and animate in — even if the element is already in the viewport at mount. Default (false) is prerender-friendly: above-the-fold BlurFades stay statically visible to avoid a flash of blurred content on first paint. Set to true for docs demos or controlled "Replay" scenarios where you always want the animation to play.

parameters.name: Class
parameters.description: Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element.

parameters.name: AdditionalAttributes
parameters.description: Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root element; a caller-supplied style is merged with the blur CSS variables rather than overwritten.

slots.name: ChildContent
slots.description: The content that blurs and fades into view as it enters the viewport.

mdSummary:
# BlurFade

Motion primitive: blur + fade-in on mount or when in view.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/blur-fade

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| BlurFade | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` | The content that blurs and fades into view as it enters the viewport. |
| BlurFade | DelayMs | `int` | `0` | Milliseconds to wait after the element enters the viewport before starting the animation. Default 0. |
| BlurFade | DurationMs | `int` | `600` | Duration of the blur/fade/slide transition in milliseconds. Default 600. |
| BlurFade | BlurPx | `int` | `8` | Starting blur radius in pixels, animated down to 0 as the element reveals. Default 8. |
| BlurFade | Yoffset | `int` | `8` | Starting vertical offset in pixels, animated down to 0 as the element reveals. Default 8. |
| BlurFade | Once | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), the reveal animation plays only the first time the element enters the viewport; when false, it replays on every entry. |
| BlurFade | ForceHidden | `bool` | `` | When true, always start in the hidden state and animate in — even if the element is already in the viewport at mount. Default (false) is prerender-friendly: above-the-fold BlurFades stay statically visible to avoid a flash of blurred content on first paint. Set to true for docs demos or controlled "Replay" scenarios where you always want the animation to play. |
| BlurFade | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root element. |
| BlurFade | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Unmatched attributes splatted onto the root element; a caller-supplied style is merged with the blur CSS variables rather than overwritten. |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (BlurFade) — The content that blurs and fades into view as it enters the viewport.

## Events
- (none)

- (none)

